title: Strait
description: A strait is an FTL connection between two star systems in a Role Playing Game.

type.description: The type of thingy the data describes, 'strait'.

schemaVersion.description: The version of the schema for the data.

straitPointA.description: The first strait point for the strait, identified by the id property of the 2 cluster/system pairs this strait connects.

straitPointB.description: The second strait point for the strait, identified by the id property of the 2 cluster/system pairs this strait connects.

direction.description: Which direction to curve the strait when drawn, 'clockwise', 'center', or 'counterclockwise'

galacticDirection.description: The galactic direction from the first cluster/system to the second cluster/system.

clusterId.description: The id of the cluster to be connected. If this is different between the 2 strait points on a strait, then this is a cluster strait.

systemId.description: The id of the system to be connected.
